meaning: n.工具,用具,爪牙,走狗,手段vt.用工具加工,使用设备vi.使用工具
examples: This tool is used for shaping wood.
This tool can be used in a variety of ways.
The two imagined including a crop-forecasting tool to provide as much clarity as possible.
What makes an intelligence explosion so worrisome is that intelligence is not a tool or a technology.
